additions: Single-select dropdown (type=drop-down): Default, Filled, Disabled, Required+Helper, Error Default, Error Filled — all 4 backgrounds
Multi-select dropdown (type=multi-drop-down): Default, Filled (with count badge), Disabled, Required+Helper, Error Default — all 4 backgrounds
All instances wrapped in ga/components/form/container with submit button to enable error-state triggering
Source style guide contained radio and checkbox types only — no dropdown types existed prior to this fixture
